## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This does not download Steam Workshop items.
- [ ] This does not bypass Steam authentication or DRM.
- [ ] This does not upload or redistribute creator assets.
- [ ] File writes stay inside the app library or another explicit user-selected destination.
- [ ] Async work cannot overlap in a way that corrupts the library manifest or stale UI state.
- [ ] User-facing docs were updated in both English and Korean when needed.

## AI Assistance

- [ ] No AI assistance was used.
- [ ] AI assistance was used and I reviewed the final diff myself.
